scope: The shared acquisition counter records authorised official-source attempts. This remains an open programme checkpoint: T0 census is complete, the full-corpus hydration was stopped with its checkpoint preserved, and T1 and closing remain pending. The bounded new-child demonstrator used 251 attributed attempts across one superseded run and one accepted run. Citation-verification requests remain evidenced in research/evidence.jsonl and citation-policy access history and are not silently added to model cost.
final_entries_required: Append the terminal T0 acquisition activity with its exact counter interval.
Append the terminal T0 hydration activity with its exact counter interval.
Append the terminal T1 and closing-delta activities with exact counter intervals.
Replace this open checkpoint with a final counter snapshot before release.
Record citation-verification request totals separately when its final report exposes them.
